title.en: Buying a Ticket from a Machine

phrases.en: Dan walked up to the ticket machine at the station.
phrases.zh: 丹走到车站的售票机前。

phrases.en: He looked at the bright touch screen.
He tapped the flag to choose English.
phrases.zh: 他点了国旗图标，选择了英语。

phrases.en: The instructions appeared clearly on the screen.
phrases.zh: 操作说明清楚地显示在屏幕上。

phrases.en: He selected his destination from the list of stations.
phrases.zh: 他从车站列表里选择了目的地。

phrases.en: He pressed the button for a single ticket.
phrases.zh: 他按下了单程票的按钮。

phrases.en: He picked the number of tickets he needed.
phrases.zh: 他选择了所需的车票数量。

phrases.en: The machine showed the total fare.
He dropped a few coins into the slot.
phrases.zh: 他往投币口投了几枚硬币。

phrases.en: Then he tapped his card on the reader to pay the rest.
phrases.zh: 然后他把卡片轻触读卡器，付清了余款。

phrases.en: The machine printed his ticket with a soft hum.
phrases.zh: 机器轻轻嗡嗡作响，打印出了他的车票。

phrases.en: He carefully collected the ticket and his change.
phrases.zh: 他小心地取走了车票和找零。

phrases.en: He put the ticket safely in his pocket.
phrases.zh: 他把车票稳妥地放进口袋。

phrases.en: Finally, he walked toward the platform.
